name: Torenza Studio Tee
description: The signature Torenza Studio piece. Heavyweight cotton, relaxed cut, garment-dyed for a flat matte finish that ages with you. Bold streetwear made for those who move differently.

name: Shadow Hoodie
description: Heavy brushed fleece hoodie with dropped shoulders and a boxy fit. Garment-washed for a broken-in feel from day one.

name: Asphalt Cargos
description: Relaxed-taper cargo pants in washed cotton twill. Deep pockets, adjustable hem, built to move.

name: Concrete Zip-Up
description: Full-zip jacket in heavyweight french terry. Clean lines, no logos, just structure.

name: Midnight Sweatpants
description: Tapered sweatpants with ribbed cuffs and a comfortable elastic waist. Dyed deep black.

name: Ghost Long Sleeve
description: Boxy long-sleeve tee with subtle back print. Heavyweight cotton, pre-shrunk.
